workflow.name: SeaweedFS 4.39 trusted arm64 build
allowed_steps: Check out Shirokuma policy
Check out the adopted SeaweedFS source
Validate the closed-world trusted build contract
Fail closed unless immutable source evidence matches
Install and verify pinned Buildx and BuildKit without credentials
Log in to GHCR for the quarantine push
Build and publish only linux/arm64
Verify the published platform
Smoke-test non-root weed mini on the exact digest
Generate CycloneDX SBOM for the exact digest
Scan the exact digest and block High or Critical findings
Record Trivy scanner and vulnerability DB freshness
Install pinned Cosign after the vulnerability gate passes
Record pinned release tools and runner substrate
Keyless-sign the scanned immutable image and retain the verification bundle
Mirror GHCR credentials for provenance publication
Publish SLSA provenance for the scanned exact digest
Remove provenance credential mirror
Verify SLSA provenance from this exact workflow
Keyless-attest the retained SBOM and scan
Record the closed-world release evidence
Verify candidate evidence with the shared contract
Retain candidate evidence before trusted-tag promotion
Remove the ephemeral Buildx builder
Check out the reviewed promotion contract
Download retained candidate evidence
Revalidate candidate evidence before promotion credentials exist
Install and verify pinned Crane without credentials
Log in to GHCR for trusted-tag promotion
Promote the fully verified digest to the trusted tag
Verify final evidence after credentials are removed
Retain final promotion evidence

admission.runtime_unblocker: parent issue #26 must add source-build evidence and pass scripts/verify_supply_chain.py check-images
